title: Courses
description: The smallest unit of instruction for which an organization grants credits. Identifies subject, course number and level, availability dates, instructional method, grading schemes, credits granted, and the granting organization.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: A global identifier of a course to be used in all external references.

type.title: Type
type.description: The type of course title (e.g. short title, long title).

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Type.

value.title: Value
value.description: The title for the course associated with the type.

description.title: Description
description.description: A description of the substance and nature of a course as it appears in a course catalog.

subject.title: Subject
subject.description: The branch of knowledge such as 'Mathematics' or 'Biology' associated with a course.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Subject.

topic.title: Topic
topic.description: The topic associated with the course.(for example - Real Estate, Modern Literature, Travel and Leisure, etc.)

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Topic.

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: The categories to which the course may belong (for example - Vocational, Co-op Work Experience, Lab, Music, etc.)

items.title: Categories
items.description: The categories to which the course may belong (for example - Vocational, Co-op Work Experience, Lab, Music, etc.)

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Categories.

courseLevels.title: Course Levels
courseLevels.description: The levels of scholarship that apply to a course.

items.title: Course Levels
items.description: The levels of scholarship that apply to a course.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Course Levels.

instructionalMethodDetails.title: Instructional Method Details
instructionalMethodDetails.description: The methods, styles, or formats in which the course is taught (for example, 'Lecture', 'Lab').

instructionalMethod.title: Instructional Method
instructionalMethod.description: The method, style, or format in which the course is taught (for example, 'Lecture', 'Lab').

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Instructional Method.

instructionalDeliveryMethod.title: Instructional Delivery Method
instructionalDeliveryMethod.description: The delivery method used for instruction.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Instructional Delivery Method.

hours.title: Hours
hours.description: The hours that may be assigned to the course by instructional method.

administrativeInstructionalMethod.title: Administrative Instructional Method
administrativeInstructionalMethod.description: The method, style, or format for which hours are established for a course.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Administrative Instructional Method.

minimum.title: Minimum
minimum.description: The minimum number of hours that may be established for an instructional method.

maximum.title: Maximum
maximum.description: The maximum number of hours that may be established for an instructional method.

increment.title: Increment
increment.description: The increment specified for the hours.

interval.title: Interval
interval.description: The interval specified for the hours.

owningInstitutionUnits.title: Owning Institution Units
owningInstitutionUnits.description: A list of units of the educational institution (optionally, hierarchical) that own or are responsible for a course

institutionUnit.title: Institution Unit
institutionUnit.description: A School, College, Division, Department, or any other organizational unit in the institution

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Institution Unit.

ownershipPercentage.title: Ownership Percentage
ownershipPercentage.description: The portion of a course that is owned or allocated to a particular organization.

schedulingStartOn.title: Course Effective Starting Date
schedulingStartOn.description: The starting date on which a course is available to have sections scheduled. When combined with the Course Effective Ending Date, this defines the time period a course is available for scheduling.

schedulingEndOn.title: Course Effective Ending Date
schedulingEndOn.description: The ending date on which a course is no longer available to have sections scheduled. When combined with the Course Effective Starting Date, this defines the time period a course is available for scheduling.

number.title: Course Number
number.description: A numbering scheme that distinguishes courses within a subject. Typically, this is an integer.

academicLevels.title: Academic Levels
academicLevels.description: The academic levels (for example, 'Under Graduate' or 'Graduate') associated with a course.

items.title: Academic Levels
items.description: The academic levels (for example, 'Under Graduate' or 'Graduate') associated with a course.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Academic Levels.

gradeSchemes.title: Grade Schemes
gradeSchemes.description: The grading schemes that may be used to award a grade to a student taking this course.

gradeScheme.title: Grade Scheme
gradeScheme.description: The grading scheme that may be used to award a grade to a student taking this course.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Grade Scheme.

usage.title: Usage
usage.description: An indicator of whether the grade scheme is used as the default for registration.

credits.title: Credits
credits.description: The credit specifications that apply to a course (for example, 'Regular Credit').

creditCategory.title: Credit Category
creditCategory.description: The academic credit category associated with the course.

creditType.title: Credit Type
creditType.description: The higher level category of academic credits.

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: The academic credit category associated with the course.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Detail.

measure.title: Measure
measure.description: A unit or standard of measurement for a course credit.

minimum.title: Minimum number
minimum.description: The lower, inclusive bound of the range of values for a course credit.

maximum.title: Maximum number
maximum.description: The upper, inclusive bound of the range of values for a course credit.

increment.title: Increment number
increment.description: The increment by which the range of values for a course credit can change from the minimum to the maximum. For example, a range of 1 to 3 with an increment of 1 would evaluate to 1, 2, or 3. Specifying an increment of 0.5 would evaluate to 1, 1.5, 2, 2.5, or 3.

billing.title: Billing
billing.description: The number of units that may be used to calculate the charge for the course.

minimum.title: Minimum
minimum.description: The minimum number of units that may be used to calculate the charge for the course.

maximum.title: Maximum
maximum.description: The maximum number of units that may be used to calculate the charge for the course.

increment.title: Increment
increment.description: The increment by which the range of values for billing units can change from the minimum to the maximum.

waitlistMultipleSections.title: Waitlist Multiple Sections
waitlistMultipleSections.description: An indication if a student is allowed to be on the waitlist for multiple sections of the same course simultaneously.

reportingDetail.title: Reporting Detail
reportingDetail.description: Additional properties required for localized reporting.

type.title: Type
type.description: The locality requiring additional reporting properties.

courseWeight.title: Course Weight
courseWeight.description: The weight assigned to the course.

administrativePeriod.title: Administrative Period
administrativePeriod.description: The administrative period associated with a course.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Administrative Period.

status.title: Status
status.description: The status associated with the course.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Status.

additionalClassifications.title: Additional Classifications
additionalClassifications.description: Additional classifications associated with the course.

cipCode.title: CIP Code
cipCode.description: The CIP code associated with the course.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the CIP Code.
